title: assign pre-flights which <cli> before mounting
description: sweech assign currently mounts an account into a workspace even if the underlying CLI (claude/codex) is not installed. User discovers the failure only at first launch.

context.text: Source (verbatim from 2026-05-16 audit): Audit Section 4: "assign <ws> <email> pre-flights which <cli> and refuses if binary missing"

acceptanceCriteria: Before writing keychain/marker, check that workspace commandName binary resolves
If missing: refuse, print install hint (brew install … or npm i -g …)
